title: Warm Smoky Argentinian Beef Skewers
description: A romantic Argentinian dish featuring smoky beef skewers with a hint of mustard and a touch of golden caster sugar, perfect for a light dinner
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat
Thread the beef strips onto skewers
In a small bowl, mix together the golden caster sugar, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper
Brush the beef skewers with olive oil and sprinkle with the sugar and spice mixture
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the beef is cooked to an internal temperature of 135 degrees
Meanwhile, mix the whole grain mustard with 1 tablespoon of water
Brush the mustard mixture onto the beef skewers during the last 2 minutes of grilling
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley
